hooks.command: git status --porcelain | grep -qE '\.(ts|svelte)$' || exit 0; result=$(npm run lint 2>&1); [ $? -eq 0 ] && exit 0; jq -n --arg r "$result" '{decision: "block", reason: $r}'
git status --porcelain | grep -qE '\.(ts|svelte)$' || exit 0; result=$(npm run build 2>&1); [ $? -eq 0 ] && exit 0; jq -n --arg r "$result" '{decision: "block", reason: $r}'

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qiE '\bnpm publish\b|electron-builder.*(--publish|publish)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Publishing commands are not allowed in Claude Code. Run manually."}}' || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
